memory:memory/2026-04-06.md:213:242.snippet: Bowen reported XML leakage from `claude-code-cli` provider not fixed after v1 (error passthrough only). Investigated deeply and found the real issue: when tool calls are extracted, the `content` field still contained XML remnants. ### Changes Made to `/home/bowen/.openclaw/extensions/claude-code/dist/server.js` 1. **Aggressive XML cleanup** — after `extractToolCalls()` finds tool calls, all remaining XML markup (`<invoke>`, `<parameter>`, `<function_calls>`, `<tool_call>`, `<invoke>`, `<parameter>`) is stripped from the content field 2. **`isCliError()` function** — blocks CLI errors ("Invalid API key", "Rate limit", etc.) from leaking to chat 3. **Format 3 regex** — handles mixed `antml:in
